title: VanillaTweaks
description: A mod which aims to improves the vanilla playthrough
body:
![](https://strikerrocker.github.io/assets/vanillatweaks/home.png)

VanillaTweaks is a Minecraft mod designed to enhance vanilla Minecraft without going overboard. It is designed to be minimally invasive and configurable to create a user experience like none others.

DISCLAIMER: This mod isn't associated with the Vanilla Tweaks resource pack/data pack website.

### Quick Links
* [Github](https://github.com/StrikerRockers-Mods/VanillaTweaks/)
* [Wiki](https://strikerrocker.github.io/vanillatweaks/)
* [Discord](https://discord.gg/tqcqeSj)
* [My website](https://strikerrocker.github.io/)

### Wiki

More info on mod this can be found on the [wiki](https://strikerrocker.github.io/vanillatweaks/)
For more in-depth review of this i recommend seeing [this](https://youtu.be/40Gk4QAkRkk) Spotlight.

 

### Miscellaneous

VanillaTweaks is extremely configurable. Everything from enabling and disabling enchantments to zooming can be configured straight from the config GUI, accessible from the mods menu or the game menu. It is advised to delete your config file every time you update VanillaTweaks, for the configuration options may have changed.

For any idea you think would be interesting to add to the mod discuss it in this discord [server](https://discord.gg/tqcqeSj)

### Issue

Report any issues of the mod [here](https://github.com/StrikerRockers-Mods/VanillaTweaks/issues/) Github
